30.2.4 - Who Signs the Plan of Care 

(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

The physician or allowed practitioner who signs the plan of care must be qualified to sign 
the certification as described in 42 CFR 424.22. 

30.2.5 - Timeliness of Signature 

(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21)
